story_arc: Create a cohesive first-person visual diary that feels cinematic, grounded, and alive. Turn the still images into intentional scenes instead of slideshow transitions.
visual_rules: Each shot must start from one source image and resolve into the next image in order.
Keep continuity between shot endings and the next shot beginnings.
Avoid abrupt cuts, abrupt morphs, and slideshow logic.
Prefer grounded motion that can plausibly connect the paired images.

scenes.title: Bridge from image1 to image2
scenes.purpose: Create a continuous transition from image1.jpg into image2.jpg.
continuity_anchors: rectangular windows with some lights on
scenes.emotional_beat: quiet and focused moving toward neutral, subdued
scenes.action_flow: Begin in the visual world of image1.jpg and move naturally into image2.jpg, keeping the same subject identity and environmental continuity.
scenes.transition_out: End fully established in image2.jpg so the next shot can continue from that state.

scenes.title: Bridge from image2 to Image3
scenes.purpose: Create a continuous transition from image2.jpg into Image3.jpeg.
continuity_anchors: rectangular windows with some lights on
ferry boat design with life rings
scenes.emotional_beat: neutral, subdued moving toward calm and contemplative
scenes.action_flow: Begin in the visual world of image2.jpg and move naturally into Image3.jpeg, keeping the same subject identity and environmental continuity.
scenes.transition_out: End fully established in Image3.jpeg so the next shot can continue from that state.

scenes.title: Bridge from Image3 to Image4
scenes.purpose: Create a continuous transition from Image3.jpeg into Image4.jpeg.
continuity_anchors: ferry boat design with life rings
many lanes of traffic with consistent vehicle types and positions
distinctive tall buildings like cylindrical and glass skyscrapers
overpasses and green freeway directional signs
scenes.emotional_beat: calm and contemplative moving toward busy urban daytime
scenes.action_flow: Begin in the visual world of Image3.jpeg and move naturally into Image4.jpeg, keeping the same subject identity and environmental continuity.
scenes.transition_out: End fully established in Image4.jpeg so the next shot can continue from that state.
